title: Trying to update a RACE TRACK with invalid data types
gherkin:
Given there exists a "RACE TRACK" "Norisring"
When the user updates the node "Norisring" with the following data
  | key | value |
  | name | 1234 |
  | opened | TEST |
  | closed | TEST |
  | type | 1234 |
  | location | 1234 |
  | geo_position | 1234 |
  | country_code | 1234 |
Then the request should be rejected with status code 400
